name: Xi'an Qujiang Cultural Tourism Co., Ltd.
summary: Xi'an Qujiang Cultural Tourism Co., Ltd. engages in the tourism business in China. The company is involved in the operation and management of scenic spots; and hotel catering management and tourism brand marketing activities. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Xi'an, China. Xi'an Qujiang Cultural Tourism Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Xi'an Qujiang Tourism Investment (Group) Co., Ltd.
